ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial instrument */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trend */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trend */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the trend in minutes */,
  "trend" TEXT /* Trend direction (e.g., uptrend, downtrend) */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price during the trend */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price during the trend */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the trend */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the trend */,
  "trend_color" TEXT /* Color code for the trend (e.g., #fcba03 for uptrend, #e336a4 for downtrend) */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the trend */,
  "trend_strength" TEXT /* Strength of the trend (e.g., weak, strong, neutral) */,
  "trend_reversal" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the trend has reversed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of the financial instrument (e.g., stock, bond) */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the financial instrument */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial instrument */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the financial instrument */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the financial instrument */,
  "instrument_description_long" TEXT /* Long description of the financial instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_instruments" (
  "user_instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-instrument pair */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "favorite" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the instrument is a favorite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_instruments_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_instruments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, trend, volatility) */,
  "alert_threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the alert is active */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert (e.g., real-time, daily, weekly) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, inactive, triggered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the market event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the market event (e.g., earnings, economic) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the market event */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the market event (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "event_impact_score" REAL /* Numerical score indicating the impact of the market event */,
  "event_relevance" TEXT /* Relevance of the event to the financial instruments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_instruments" (
  "event_instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event-instrument pair */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market event */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "event_instrument_relevance" TEXT /* Relevance of the event to the specific instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_instruments_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_instruments_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES market_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Time the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Time the user logged out */,
  "session_token" TEXT /* Session token for authentication */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Information about the user's device (e.g., browser, operating system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., view, alert, trade) */,
  "activity_time" TEXT /* Time of the activity */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument (if applicable) */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Details about the user activity (e.g., specific actions taken, pages visited) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_time" TEXT /* Time the comment was posted */,
  "comment_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the comment (e.g., likes, dislikes) */,
  "comment_replies" TEXT /* Replies to the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_comments_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
